proposals.content:
---
title: Anzu
---
Anzu is an extraordinarily long-lived individual, said to be the oldest person one has ever met — a distinction that has held true for hundreds of years.

---
title: Leomund's Tiny Hut
---
A magical shelter that is opaque from the outside but transparent from the inside; the caster may choose the color of its exterior.

---
title: Palomar
---
A fort located to the east of [[Karwin]], formerly known by a different name before being renamed to Palomar.

On regional maps, Palomar appears to the right of [[Karwin]], with a mountain range roughly halfway up the map, [[Trilene]] marked nearby, and the beginning of a body of water visible on the far west side of the map.

> [!note] Former Name
> Palomar was formerly known by a different name; the old name has been obscured on at least one known map.

---
title: Phoenicians
---
The Phoenicians are a group or faction of current relevance.

proposals.message:
Claim: Spiders in the spider's lair produce silk that is considered very important.
Rationale: No candidate wiki page matched this claim.

Claim: A priest of Slumber is located in a nearby town.
Rationale: No candidate wiki page matched this claim.

Claim: Only approximately five towns remain in the region.
Rationale: No candidate wiki page matched this claim.

Claim: The Archmage's name is Brightbuckle (also referred to as Nalo Brightbuckle).
Rationale: No candidate wiki page matched this claim.
